title: 隔离采用方供应链证据边界
outOfScope: Changing template SBOM/provenance generation covered by R2/R3
Changing secret scanning coverage covered by R5

sources.reason: Managed installer copy and adoption evidence behavior.

riskAssessment.reason: Copying template evidence into an adopter repository can create false provenance.

executionDecision.reason: Contract defines adopter evidence exclusions and verification.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm all template-owned evidence files are excluded from managed copies and upgrades.
Confirm adopter evidence is generated only after adoption, not copied from template.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Installer and upgrade managed-copy sets exclude template SBOM, provenance, and Bandit baseline evidence.
Adoption creates adopter-owned evidence instead of accepting template evidence as project evidence.
Regression tests cover fresh install, upgrade, and adoption behavior.
The evidence boundary is documented and the Work Item is archived and committed.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: A template repository's supply-chain artifacts describe the template, not the adopter project, and must not cross the installation boundary as if they were adopter evidence.
constraints: Do not weaken adoption readiness or upgrade rollback behavior.
intent.rationale: Excluding template-owned evidence at the managed-copy boundary prevents provenance confusion while allowing adopters to generate their own evidence.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Fresh install excludes template SBOM, provenance, and Bandit baseline.
Upgrade does not reintroduce template evidence into adopter paths.
Adoption generates adopter-owned records without copying template evidence.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
